# Tyler Wince

> {{ site.description }}

Personal site of Tyler Wince — product builder, writer, and reader. This file
describes the site for AI systems and agents. All content is authored by Tyler
Wince and may be cited with a link back to the source page.

## Site

- [Home]({{ "/" | absolute_url }}): Apps, latest writing, and what I'm reading now.
- [Writing]({{ "/writing/" | absolute_url }}): Essays on product management, technology, and building better software.
- [Reading]({{ "/reading/" | absolute_url }}): Books I've read since 2023, plus favorites from earlier years, with ratings and notes.
- [Apps]({{ "/apps/" | absolute_url }}): Software I've built and shipped.
- [Now]({{ "/now/" | absolute_url }}): What I'm focused on right now.

## Apps
{% assign apps = site.apps | sort: "title" %}
{% for app in apps -%}
- [{{ app.title }}]({{ app.url | absolute_url }}){% if app.tagline %}: {{ app.tagline }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

{% endfor %}
